basic_details.job_title: Gurugram University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for 13 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Gurugram University Assistant Professor Notification 2026 has been released on 30 June 2026 on the official website https://www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in. A total of 13 vacancies have been announced through the Gurugram University Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016, Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A/ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent and two years of professional experience, First class B. Pharm. With Master's degree in Pharmacy (M. Pharm.) + registered in State Pharmacy Council
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Indian Language), Assistant Professor (Law), Assistant Professor (Media Studies), Assistant Professor (Psychology): Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned/relevant/allied subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016. Assistant Professor (Management): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A/ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent and two years of professional experience after acquiring the Master's Degree. Assistant Professor (Pharmaceutical Sciences): First class B. Pharm. With Master's degree in Pharmacy (M. Pharm.) in the appropriate branch of specialization in Pharmacy + registered in State Pharmacy Council.

selection_process: Written Test (Domain Knowledge) PPT Presentation (Teaching Skills) Interview
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

all_official_links.label: Download Gurugram University Job 2026 Notification PDF

rows.gurugram_university: Master's degree with 55% marks in concerned/relevant/allied subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016, Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A/ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent and two years of professional experience, First class B. Pharm. With Master's degree in Pharmacy (M. Pharm.) + registered in State Pharmacy Council

content_sections.heading: Gurugram University Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Gurugram University Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Gurugram University Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Gurugram University Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Assistant Professor (Indian Language), Assistant Professor (Law), Assistant Professor (Media Studies), Assistant Professor (Psychology): Master's degree with 55% marks in the concerned/relevant/allied subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC Regulations 2009/2016. Assistant Professor (Management): Bachelor's Degree in any discipline and Master's Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A/ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent and two years of professional experience after acquiring the Master's Degree. Assistant Professor (Pharmaceutical Sciences): First class B. Pharm. With Master's degree in Pharmacy (M. Pharm.) in the appropriate branch of specialization in Pharmacy + registered in State Pharmacy Council.

content_sections.heading: Gurugram University Recruitment 2026 - Age Limit
content_sections.text: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 55 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

content_sections.heading: Gurugram University Recruitment 2026 - Selection Process
content_sections.text: Written Test (Domain Knowledge) PPT Presentation (Teaching Skills) Interview

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in. Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 17-07-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for Gurugram University Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the Assistant Professor posts at Gurugram University is 17th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches the university before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies by post. Generally, it requires a Master's degree with 55% marks and NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. Specific qualifications for Management and Pharmaceutical Sciences are also detailed in the notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor positions?
faq.answer: There are a total of 13 vacancies for the Assistant Professor positions at Gurugram University, distributed across various disciplines as specified in the recruitment notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application fee for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The application fee is Rs. 1000/- for General/OBC candidates. SC/ST candidates (Haryana domicile) need to pay Rs. 250/-, and PwBD candidates (Haryana only) are exempt from the fee.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 55 years for all Assistant Professor posts. Age relaxation will be provided as per government norms.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary offered for the Assistant Professor role?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor positions will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 57700/- per month.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for Gurugram University Assistant Professor recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve a Written Test focusing on domain knowledge, followed by a PPT Presentation to assess teaching skills, and finally, an Interview.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent or contract job?
faq.answer: The job type for these Assistant Professor positions at Gurugram University is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. How can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of Gurugram University, which is www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in.

faq.question: Q10. Where should I send the filled application form?
faq.answer: The completed application form, along with all required documents, should be sent to the address mentioned in the official notification through Speed Post or Registered Post.
